title: VimFu — z+ Top First Non-Blank
description: z+ (z Enter) scrolls the screen so the cursor line is at the top and moves the cursor to the first non-blank character.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Z Enter scrolls the screen so the cursor line is at the top, and moves the cursor to the first non-blank character. It combines Z T with caret.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: jump, position cursor at end, use z Enter ---

steps.say: Jump to line twenty six, the Dungeon class. Move to the end.
Z Enter. The line goes to the top, and the cursor jumps to the first non-blank.
The cursor is now on the C of class, at the top of the screen.
Jump to line thirty seven, end of the line.
Z T first. The line goes to the top, but the cursor stays at the end.
Now Z Enter. The cursor moves to the first non-blank character.
Z T keeps the cursor, Z Enter aligns it.
Z Enter. Cursor line to the top, cursor to the first non-blank.
